children.text: to an air carrier in an amount equal to the salaries and benefits reported by the air carrier to the Department of Transportation pursuant to part 241 of title 14, Code of Federal Regulations, for the period from , through ; andApril 1, 2019September 30, 2019

to an air carrier that does not transmit reports under such part 241, in an amount that such air carrier certifies, using sworn financial statements or other appropriate data, as the amount of wages, salaries, benefits, and other compensation that such air carrier paid the employees of such air carrier during the period from , through ; andApril 1, 2019September 30, 2019

to a contractor, in an amount that the contractor certifies, using sworn financial statements or other appropriate data, as the amount of wages, salaries, benefits, and other compensation that such contractor paid the employees of such contractor during the period from , through .April 1, 2019September 30, 2019

children.heading: Forms; terms and conditions
children.label: A Forms; terms and conditions
children.text: Financial assistance provided to an air carrier or contractor under this part shall be in such form, on such terms and conditions (including requirements for audits and the clawback of any financial assistance provided upon failure by a passenger air carrier, cargo air carrier, or contractor to honor the assurances specified in ), as the Secretary determines appropriate.section 9074 of this title

children.heading: Procedures
children.label: B Procedures
children.text: The Secretary shall publish streamlined and expedited procedures not later than 5 days after , for air carriers and contractors to submit requests for financial assistance under this part.March 27, 2020

children.heading: Deadline for immediate payroll assistance
children.label: 2 Deadline for immediate payroll assistance
children.text: Not later than 10 days after , the Secretary shall make initial payments to air carriers and contractors that submit requests for financial assistance approved by to the Secretary.March 27, 2020

children.heading: Subsequent payments
children.label: 3 Subsequent payments
children.text: The Secretary shall determine an appropriate method for timely distribution of payments to air carriers and contractors with approved requests for financial assistance from any funds remaining available after providing initial financial assistance payments under paragraph (2).

children.heading: Pro rata authority
children.label: c Pro rata authority
children.text: The Secretary shall have the authority to reduce, on a pro rata basis, the amounts due to air carriers and contractors under the applicable paragraph of in order to address any shortfall in assistance that would otherwise be provided under such section.section 9072 of this title

children.heading: Audits
children.label: d Audits
children.text: The Inspector General of the Department of the Treasury shall audit certifications made under subsection (a).
